epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical history of urgency with leakage; bladder diary; rule out UTI

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Tens of millions of adults across EU
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with behavioral therapy and medications

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care assessment; urology/urogynecology referral as needed
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Bladder training, pelvic floor therapy, antimuscarinics or beta-3 agonists
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access to pelvic floor therapy varies by country
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong specialist networks and guideline-based care
